title: Brush Your Teeth Song for Kids
description: A short child-friendly brushing lesson for building a simple morning and night routine.

title: Why Do We Brush Our Teeth?
description: A simple lesson about plaque, germs, and how brushing protects teeth from cavities.

title: A Visit to the Dentist
description: A gentle guide to help children feel comfortable before a dental checkup.

title: Healthy Snacks for Teeth
description: A quick lesson about choosing foods and drinks that are kinder to teeth.

title: Two Minute Brush Timer
description: A timer-style video to help children brush long enough every day.

title: Flossing for Little Teeth
description: A simple introduction to flossing and cleaning between teeth.
